heading: Barnawartha vs Barnawartha North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barnawartha, Victoria and Barnawartha North, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barnawartha North has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Barnawartha (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barnawartha or Barnawartha North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barnawartha has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Barnawartha North scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barnawartha scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Barnawartha North scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barnawartha or Barnawartha North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barnawartha North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
